ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "seo_url" TEXT /* SEO-friendly URL for the category */,
  "meta_title" TEXT /* Meta title for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO purposes */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is published */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last modified */,
  "parent_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent category, if any */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., main, sub) */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is featured */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., thumbnail, banner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_images_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seo_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each set of SEO metadata */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category the metadata belongs to */,
  "meta_title" TEXT /* Meta title for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO purposes */,
  "canonical_url" TEXT /* Canonical URL for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seo_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_publishing" (
  "publishing_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each publishing event */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was published */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, pending, live) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publishing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_publishing_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy record */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent category */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the category in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_hierarchies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_hierarchies_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_access" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the category */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the accessing user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_access_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_performance" (
  "performance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metrics were recorded */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the category */,
  "avg_time_on_page" REAL /* Average time users spent on the category page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_products" (
  "association_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
